name: DAAD Development-Related Postgraduate Courses
description: Scholarships for graduates from developing countries to pursue postgraduate degrees in Germany in development-related fields.

name: Chevening Scholarship
description: UK government scholarship for outstanding professionals with leadership potential to study a one-year master's degree in the UK.

name: Commonwealth Master's Scholarship
description: For students from Commonwealth countries to pursue a master's degree at a UK university. Funded by the UK Department for Education.

name: Commonwealth PhD Scholarship
description: For students from Commonwealth countries to pursue a PhD at a UK university. Funded by the UK Department for Education.

name: MEXT Research Student Scholarship
eligible_nationalities: All countries with diplomatic relations with Japan
description: Japanese government scholarship for international students to conduct research at Japanese universities. Covers tuition, living allowance, and round-trip airfare.

name: Fulbright Foreign Student Program
description: The Fulbright Foreign Student Program enables graduate students, young professionals, and artists from abroad to study and conduct research in the United States.

name: ARES Scholarships (Belgium)
provider: ARES (Académie de Recherche et d'Enseignement Supérieur)
description: Scholarships for students from developing countries to pursue master's degrees or training courses in Wallonia-Brussels, Belgium.

name: Mastercard Foundation Scholars Program
host_institution: Various partner universities in Africa and globally
description: The Mastercard Foundation Scholars Program provides access to quality and inclusive education for young people from Africa.

name: Aga Khan Foundation International Scholarship
description: The Aga Khan Foundation provides a limited number of scholarships each year for postgraduate studies to outstanding students from developing countries.

name: Gates Cambridge Scholarship
description: Full-cost scholarship for outstanding students from outside the UK to pursue a postgraduate degree at the University of Cambridge.

name: ETH Zurich Excellence Scholarships
description: Excellence Scholarships for outstanding Master's students at ETH Zurich. Covers full tuition and living expenses.

name: Korean Government Scholarship Program (KGSP)
eligible_nationalities: All countries with diplomatic relations with Korea
description: Korean government scholarship for international students. Includes tuition, living allowance, round-trip airfare, and Korean language training.

name: Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC)
description: Chinese government scholarship for international students to study at Chinese universities. Covers tuition, accommodation, living allowance, and insurance.

name: Türkiye Bursları (Turkish Government Scholarship)
description: Turkish government scholarship for international students. Covers tuition, monthly stipend, accommodation, health insurance, and one-year Turkish language course.

name: Australia Awards Scholarship
description: Australian government scholarships for students from developing countries to study at Australian universities. Covers full tuition, living expenses, and travel.

name: NUFFIC/NFP Scholarship (Netherlands)
description: Netherlands Fellowship Programme for mid-career professionals from developing countries to pursue short courses, master's, and PhD programs in the Netherlands.

name: Swedish Institute Scholarships for Global Professionals (SISGP)
description: Scholarships for students from developing countries to pursue master's studies in Sweden. Covers tuition, living expenses, travel grant, and insurance.

name: Eiffel Excellence Scholarship (France)
provider: French Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs
description: French government scholarship for international students enrolled in French educational institutions at master's and doctoral levels.

name: Türkiye Bursları Undergraduate Scholarship
description: Turkish government scholarship for international students to pursue a full bachelor's degree in Türkiye. Covers tuition, accommodation, health insurance, monthly stipend, and a one-year Turkish language preparatory course.

name: Stipendium Hungaricum Undergraduate
description: Hungarian government scholarship for international students covering full bachelor's degree programs in Hungary. Includes tuition, accommodation, monthly stipend, and Hungarian language training.

name: Global Korea Scholarship (GKS) Undergraduate
description: Korean government scholarship for international students to pursue a 4-year bachelor's degree (including 1-year Korean language program) at designated Korean universities. Covers tuition, settlement allowance, monthly stipend, medical insurance, and airfare.

name: MEXT Undergraduate Scholarship (Japan)
provider: Japanese Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology (MEXT)
description: Japanese government scholarship for international students to study a 5-year undergraduate program (including 1-year Japanese language preparatory course) at designated Japanese universities. Covers tuition, monthly stipend, and round-trip airfare.

name: Chinese Government Scholarship — Undergraduate
description: Chinese government scholarship for international students to pursue a bachelor's degree in China. Covers tuition, accommodation, monthly stipend, and comprehensive medical insurance. Includes a 1-year Chinese language preparatory program for non-native speakers.

name: ASEAN Undergraduate Scholarship
description: Singapore government scholarship for ASEAN nationals to study a 4-year undergraduate degree at top Singapore universities. Covers tuition, monthly living allowance, accommodation, and one round-trip airfare per year.

name: Erasmus Mundus Joint Bachelor (EMJMD-B)
description: Erasmus Mundus Joint Bachelor Degree scholarships fund multi-country undergraduate study at a consortium of European universities. Covers tuition, travel, installation costs, and a monthly subsistence allowance. Strong focus on STEM and social sciences.

name: Utrecht University Excellence Scholarship (BSc)
description: Utrecht University's Excellence Scholarship offers tuition fee waivers to outstanding non-EU/EEA students applying to selective Bachelor's programmes. Awarded as 100% tuition waiver for the first year (renewable based on academic performance).

name: Fulbright Foreign Student Program (Master's)
provider: US Department of State / Institute of International Education (IIE)
description: Fulbright Foreign Student Program sends outstanding international students to the United States for a Master's degree. Covers tuition, living stipend, airfare, and health insurance. Highly competitive with country-specific selection.

name: Rhodes Scholarship (Oxford Master's)
description: The Rhodes Scholarship is the oldest and one of the most prestigious international scholarship programs in the world. Funds postgraduate study at the University of Oxford with full coverage including tuition, living allowance, and airfare. Awarded to 100+ scholars annually across 30+ constituencies.

name: Gates Cambridge Scholarship
description: Gates Cambridge Scholarships are awarded to outstanding applicants from outside the UK to pursue a full-time postgraduate degree at the University of Cambridge. Covers university composition fee, maintenance allowance, airfare, and visa costs.

name: Commonwealth Master's Scholarship
description: Funded by the UK Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office, Commonwealth Master's Scholarships enable talented and motivated individuals from Commonwealth countries to gain the knowledge and skills required for sustainable development. Covers tuition, living allowance, airfare, and settling-in allowance.

name: MEXT Master's Scholarship (Japan)
provider: Japanese Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology (MEXT)
description: Japanese government scholarship for international students to pursue a Master's degree at a designated Japanese university. Covers tuition, monthly stipend, airfare, and provides a 6-month Japanese language preparatory course for non-native speakers.

name: Global Korea Scholarship (GKS) Master's
description: Korean government scholarship for international students pursuing a Master's degree at designated Korean universities. Covers tuition, settlement allowance, monthly stipend, medical insurance, and airfare. Korean-taught programs include a 1-year language course.

name: Erasmus Mundus Joint Master (EMJMD)
description: Erasmus Mundus Joint Master Degrees are prestigious international Master's programs delivered by consortia of European universities. Covers tuition, travel, installation costs, and a monthly subsistence allowance for the full program duration across 2+ countries.

name: Australia Awards Scholarship
provider: Australian Department of Foreign Affairs and Trade (DFAT)
description: Australia Awards Scholarships are prestigious international awards funded by the Australian Government. They provide full tuition, return airfare, establishment allowance, contribution to living expenses (CLA), and health insurance for the duration of study.

name: NSF Graduate Research Fellowship Program (GRFP)
eligible_nationalities: US citizens, permanent residents, and nationals
description: The NSF GRFP supports outstanding graduate students pursuing research-based Master's and doctoral degrees in NSF-supported STEM disciplines. Provides an annual stipend, cost-of-education allowance, and access to research opportunities across the US. Open to bachelor's-level applicants.

name: Marshall Scholarship
description: Marshall Scholarships fund up to 50 outstanding young Americans to study for a graduate degree at any UK university, including the possibility of pursuing a PhD directly from a bachelor's degree. Covers tuition, living allowance, airfare, and book grant.

name: Clarendon Scholarship (Oxford PhD)
description: The Clarendon Scholarship is a prestigious graduate scholarship at the University of Oxford, awarded to outstanding candidates from all around the world. Around 140 scholarships are awarded annually across all degree levels (Master's and DPhil/PhD), with strong representation for direct-PhD applicants.

name: Cambridge Trust International Scholarship (PhD)
description: Cambridge Trust offers a number of full-cost PhD scholarships to outstanding international students from any country outside the UK. Funds direct-PhD entry from a bachelor's degree. Covers university composition fee, maintenance allowance, airfare, and visa costs.

name: Marie Skłodowska-Curie Doctoral Network
description: MSCA Doctoral Networks fund international, interdisciplinary and inter-sectoral doctoral training. Researchers (including those entering with a master's degree) receive a generous living allowance, mobility allowance, and family allowance. Programs typically span 3+ years across multiple European institutions.

name: Boehringer Ingelheim Fonds PhD Fellowship
description: BIF PhD Fellowships support outstanding young scientists (typically with a master's degree) pursuing experimental projects in basic biomedical research at internationally renowned research institutions worldwide. Covers personal stipend, travel, materials, and insurance.

name: NIH F31 Predoctoral Fellowship (US)
eligible_nationalities: US citizens, permanent residents, and nationals
description: The F31 Kirschstein-NRSA Predoctoral Fellowship supports promising doctoral candidates (typically with a master's) in dissertation research training in scientific health-related fields. Provides stipend, tuition, fees, and institutional allowance for up to 5 years.

name: Wellcome PhD Fellowship (Health)
host_institution: Any UK or low/middle-income country research institution
description: Wellcome PhD Fellowships support graduate students with a master's degree undertaking a PhD in any area of health research. Funds research expenses, salary/stipend, tuition, and travel costs. Particularly welcoming of applications from low- and middle-income countries.

name: Marie Skłodowska-Curie Postdoctoral Fellowship
host_institution: Any European or international research institution
description: MSCA Postdoctoral Fellowships support researchers holding a PhD who wish to carry out research abroad (mobility rule applies) in any discipline. Provides a generous living allowance, mobility allowance, family allowance, and research/training/networking budget. Open to all nationalities.

name: Alexander von Humboldt Research Fellowship (Postdoc)
description: Humboldt Research Fellowships for postdoctoral researchers allow internationally outstanding scientists and scholars to conduct research in Germany for 6-24 months. Open to all disciplines, no quotas for specific countries. Covers monthly fellowship, language fellowship, and travel.

name: Fulbright Postdoctoral Scholar Program
host_institution: Any US university or research institution
description: Fulbright Postdoctoral Scholar Awards send researchers and professionals with a PhD to the United States for postdoctoral research or lecturing at US universities. Covers monthly stipend, airfare, and a settling-in allowance. Country-specific selection processes apply.

name: Newton Fund Postdoctoral Fellowships
host_institution: Various UK universities and research institutions
provider: British Council / UK Research and Innovation
description: Newton Fund Postdoctoral Fellowships support early-career researchers from Newton Fund partner countries to undertake postdoctoral research in the UK. Strong focus on social and economic development research. Covers salary, travel, and research costs.
